mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, filepath, filename, workflow_type as workflowType, prompt_text as promptText, negative_text as negativeText, params_json as paramsJson, create_time as createTime FROM ai_gen_picture WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_gen_picture (user_id, filepath, filename, workflow_type, prompt_text, negative_text, params_json, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{filepath}, #{filename}, #{workflowType}, #{promptText}, #{negativeText}, #{paramsJson}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_gen_picture WHERE id = #{param1} AND user_id = #{param2}
